original_abstract: The practical activities are surely one of the best methodological resources in facilitating the teaching-learning process, because besides awakening interest in the scientific world, they also allow the formation of knowledge and critical positioning of the student about the world around him. However, it is clear that, as a rule, the lectures are more valued. In this sense, the present study evaluated, characterized and encouraged the use of practical classes in Science Education in two schools of Vitória de Santo Antão / PE, one of the Rural Zone (Duque de Caxias) and another of Urban Zone (August 3). Data were obtained from visits and questionnaires for teachers of the schools involved. The results revealed that the Duque de Caxias School has better conditions and greater commitment by teachers to conduct practical classes in relation to School August 3. Lack of resources (infrastructural and materials), classes with high numbers of students and the unavailability of educators were the main causes given by teachers from both schools for the low implementation of practical classes. Based on these results, workbooks were prepared to 6th to 9th graders of elementary school, in order to assist teachers and students in the teaching-learning process.
humanized_abstract: Activities that compose the practical classes are undoubtedly one of the most important methodological resources for the teaching and learning process of science, since they arouse the interest of students for scientific phenomena, allowing the construction of knowledge and student critical thinking regarding the surrounding world. However, the lectures are usually considered more important. Therefore, this study aimed to evaluate, characterize and encourage the practical classes in Science Education in two schools of Vitória de Santo Antão / PE, one located in the Rural Area (Duque de Caxias) and the other in the Urban Area (August 3). The data were collected during field visits and through questionnaires applied to teachers from the schools involved in the research. The results show that the Duque de Caxias School has better conditions and more involvement of teachers in the implementation of practical classes in Science Education when compared to the August 3 School. The main reasons given by the teachers of the two schools for the low implementation of practical classes in Science Education were lack of infrastructure, high number of students in the classes and lack of availability of educators. Based on this basis, the workbooks were developed for students of 6th to 9th grades of elementary school in order to assist teachers in the teaching and learning process.

Based on this basis, the workbooks were developed for students of 6th to 9th grades of elementary school in order to assist teachers in the teaching and learning process.
